title: Charity golf day makes a difference
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS -  The George Business Chamber has extended its gratitude to each and every one who made the 2024 George Business Chamber Charity Golf Day sponsored by Tekkie Town a success. “Your generosity and unwavering support have left a lasting impact on our community,” said chamber manager Sonia van der Merwe.


> “Thanks to your contributions, both Sanca and the Phambili Women’s Shelter have received a significant boost. Each organisation was handed R10 000 towards the causes they represent. Your compassion and commitment to making a difference are truly commendable,” said Van der Merwe.


She said Tekkie Town is once again on board as the main sponsor for next year’s chamber charity golf day.

From left are George Business Chamber director Keith Sharpe; Phambile Women’s Shelter manager Esmarie Bruwer; George Business Chamber chairperson Johannes Jumat; and commercial executive at Tekkie Town Johann Warnich. Photo: Jacques du Toit


> UPCOMING EVENTS


Network evening

Hosted by Core Office FurnitureDate: 1 AugustTime: 17:30 for 18:00 to 20:00Morning Network Marketing Session

Hosted by GRIT HubDate: 6 AugustTime: 07:45 for 08:00 to 09:30George Business Chamber AGM

Date: 15 AugustTime: 17:30 to 19:00Network Evening

Hosted by George TourismDate: 28 August (note that this is a new date)Time: 17:30 for 18:00 to 20:00

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
